prompt: Create an interactive customer journey map for a SaaS onboarding experience with 4 phases: Awareness (landing page, pricing page), Sign Up (registration, email verification), Onboarding (product tour, first project, invite team), and Adoption (daily usage, feature discovery). Include emotion scores showing excitement during sign up dropping to frustration during onboarding then recovering. Add pain points and opportunities for each phase.
expected_output: A standalone HTML file with D3.js rendering a grid-based journey map with 4 phase columns, emotion curve SVG showing the dip during onboarding, pain points in red-accented cells, opportunities in green-accented cells, and interactive hover/click behaviors.
